## Summary

- [ ] Linked issue (or `N/A`)
- [ ] Summary of changes
- [ ] Adapter contract change type: `additive` / `semantic change` /
      `breaking` / `N/A`

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix / patch
- [ ] New adapter component or additive public API
- [ ] Adapter semantic behavior change
- [ ] Breaking adapter contract change
- [ ] Documentation / config only
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (alias for `npm run ci:verify`)
- [ ] `examples/` build verified if install, exports, or example wiring changed
- [ ] No CSS, token, or recipe changes introduced
- [ ] Generated output in `dist/` was regenerated via `npm run build` if
      package output changed
- [ ] Tests, docs, exports, and examples updated for public behavior changes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased]` updated if user-facing behavior changed

## Screenshots (if applicable)

## Notes for Reviewers
